projectDescription: A structured, fan-made transcript dataset covering Deltarune Chapters 1–4, formatted for LLM fine-tuning and narrative context retrieval.
keyFeatures: Full transcripts for Deltarune Chapters 1–4 (Normal Route)
Structured JSONL format with context, speaker, and text fields
Apache Parquet versions for efficient columnar querying
Includes Sword Route content for Chapter 3
CC0 Public Domain license — no restrictions
Python script for regenerating Parquet files from JSONL sources
publicApiSurface: Parquet files: chap1_dataset.parquet, chap2_dataset.parquet, chap3_dataset.parquet, chap4_dataset.parquet, full_chapters_dataset.parquet
parquet.py: make_parquets() — converts JSONL to Parquet
Speaker tags: Character names, Narrator, Player
